evals.prompt: Generate CLAUDE.md for the books module.
evals.expected_output: A CLAUDE.md file created at modules/books/CLAUDE.md with Overview, Exports, Storage, Engines, Schemas, Test Coverage, Parity Status, and Key Files sections.

expectations.name: creates-claude-md
expectations.assertion: A file is created at modules/books/CLAUDE.md

expectations.name: has-required-sections
expectations.assertion: The generated file contains at minimum: Overview, Exports, Storage, and Test Coverage sections

expectations.name: exports-match-source
expectations.assertion: The Exports section lists functions and types that actually exist in modules/books/src/index.ts

expectations.name: identifies-test-gaps
expectations.assertion: The Test Coverage section identifies specific untested engines or functions rather than just a file count

evals.prompt: Which modules are missing CLAUDE.md? Generate docs for all of them.
evals.expected_output: Scans all modules/ and packages/ directories, lists those missing CLAUDE.md, and generates standardized docs for each.

expectations.name: inventories-missing-docs
expectations.assertion: Output lists the specific modules and packages that are missing CLAUDE.md files

expectations.name: generates-multiple-files
expectations.assertion: At least 3 CLAUDE.md files are created across different modules or packages
